outside station\n                tables_to_move.append((lbl, a))\n    except Exception: pass\n\n# New positions inside station — concourse/waiting zone\ninside_positions = [\n    (900, -2200), (1100, -2200), (1300, -2200),\n    (900, -1800), (1100, -1800),\n]\nmoved = 0\nfor (lbl, a), (nx, ny) in zip(tables_to_move, inside_positions):\n    z = ground_z(nx, ny, ps_z)\n    a.set_actor_location(unreal.Vector(nx, ny, z), False, False)\n    _actor_locs.append((nx, ny))\n    moved += 1\n    print(f\"  MOVED {lbl} -> ({nx},{ny},{z:.0f})\")\nprint(f\"MOVED_TABLES={moved}\")\n\n# --- Ops 4-7: Delete 4 more SM_Bench actors ---\nFLOOR_PATS = ('floor', 'ground', 'plane', 'landscape', 'terrain', 'pavement', 'sidewalk')\nbench_del = 0\nfor a in eas.get_all_level_actors():\n    try:\n        lbl = a.get_actor_label()\n        if any(p in lbl.lower() for p in FLOOR_PATS): continue\n        if lbl.lower().startswith('sm_bench'):\n            eas.destroy_actor(a)\n            bench_del += 1\n            print(f\"  DEL bench: {lbl}\")\n            if bench_del >= 4: break\n    except Exception: pass\nprint(f\"DELETED_BENCHES={bench_del}\")\n\n# --- Ops 8-12: Spawn 5 more period props: BP_Hydrant as period standpipes ---\nbp_hydrant = unreal.load_object(None, \"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Hydrant.BP_Hydrant_C\")\nhydrant_xys = [\n    (200, -2000), (200, 0), (200, 2000),\n    (2100, -1500), (2100, 1500),\n]\nspawned_h = 0\nfor x, y in hydrant_xys:\n    if not is_clear(x, y, min_dist=120): continue\n    z = ground_z(x, y, ps_z)\n    a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(bp_hydrant, unreal.Vector(x, y, z))\n    if a:\n        a.set_actor_label(f\"Standpipe_{spawned_h}\")\n        _actor_locs.append((x, y))\n        spawned_h += 1\n        print(f\"  HYDRANT at ({x},{y},{z:.0f})\")\nprint(f\"SPAWNED_HYDRANTS={spawned_h}\")\n\nprint(f\"ROUND3_OPS={moved+bench_del+spawned_h}\")\n"}}

and abs(loc.y) < 50:\n            z = ground_z(500, -2700, ps_z)\n            a.set_actor_location(unreal.Vector(500, -2700, z), False, False)\n            ops += 1\n            print(f\"  MOVED {lbl} -> (500,-2700,{z:.0f})\")\n            break\n    except Exception: pass\n\n# Op 3-5: Spread WaitTable_3 further from WaitTable_0 (now at 900,-2200)\n# Move WaitTable_3 from (-300,-2500) to (700, 600) — open concourse platform\nfor a in eas.get_all_level_actors():\n    try:\n        lbl = a.get_actor_label()\n        if lbl == 'WaitTable_3':\n            z = ground_z(700, 600, ps_z)\n            a.set_actor_location(unreal.Vector(700, 600, z), False, False)\n            ops += 1\n            print(f\"  MOVED WaitTable_3 -> (700,600,{z:.0f})\")\n            break\n    except Exception: pass\n\n# Op 4: Delete last SM_Bench20 to further open platform\nfor a in eas.get_all_level_actors():\n    try:\n        lbl = a.get_actor_label()\n        if lbl == 'SM_Bench20':\n            eas.destroy_actor(a)\n            ops += 1\n            print(f\"  DEL SM_Bench20\")\n            break\n    except Exception: pass\n\n# Op 5: Add final trash bin at southern gate area (1400,-2900)\n_actor_locs = []\nfor a in eas.get_all_level_actors():\n    try:\n        l = a.get_actor_location()\n        if abs(l.x) > 1e7: continue\n        _actor_locs.append((l.x, l.y))\n    except Exception: pass\n\ndef is_clear(x, y, min_dist=100):\n    for ax, ay in _actor_locs:\n        if (ax-x)**2 + (ay-y)**2 < min_dist*min_dist:\n            return False\n    return True\n\nbp_bin = unreal.load_object(None, \"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Trash_bin_a.BP_Trash_bin_a_C\")\nif is_clear(1400, -2900, 110):\n    z = ground_z(1400, -2900, ps_z)\n    a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(bp_bin, unreal.Vector(1400, -2900, z))\n    if a:\n        a.set_actor_label(\"TrashBin_gate\")\n        ops += 1\n        print(f\"  FINAL_BIN at (1400,-2900,{z:.0f})\")\nelse:\n    print(\"  SKIP BIN (spot occupied)\")\n\nprint(f\"TOTAL_OPS_R5={ops}\")\nprint(\"ROUND_5_COMPLETE\")\n"}}
